content:
<action>
<tool>fs.batch_write</tool>
<files>
[
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/project/premise.md",
    "content": "# Premise\n\nA sprawling epic set in a world where magic is tied to the celestial alignment of the stars, leading to shifting power dynamics and ancient conflicts."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/project/themes.md",
    "content": "# Themes\n\n- The cost of power\n- Destiny vs. Free Will\n- The impact of celestial cycles on mortal life"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/request/objective.md",
    "content": "# Objective\n\nTo create a comprehensive and consistent long novel with a robust world-building foundation."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/request/constraints.md",
    "content": "# Constraints\n\n- Maintain strict consistency with established lore.\n- Ensure character motivations drive the plot.\n- Scalable structure for long-term writing."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/relations/character-plot.md",
    "content": "# Character Plot\n\n[Mapping character arcs to the main plot events.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/relations/setting-plot.md",
    "content": "# Setting Plot\n\n[Mapping how environmental and celestial changes affect the narrative.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/plot/act-structure.md",
    "content": "# Act Structure\n\n- Act I: The Awakening of the Stars\n- Act II: The Great Alignment\n- Act III: The Celestial Convergence"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/plot/chapter-spine.md",
    "content": "# Chapter Spine\n\n[A detailed outline of each chapter's primary event.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/plot/conflict-lattice.md",
    "content": "# Conflict Lattice\n\n[Interconnected web of character, environmental, and societal conflicts.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/characters/protagonist.md",
    "content": "# Protagonist\n\n[Detailed description of the main hero, their flaws, and their goal.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/characters/antagonist.md",
    "content": "# Antagonist\n\n[Detailed description of the main villain, their motivations, and their role.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/characters/supporting-cast.md",
    "content": "# Supporting Cast\n\n[Descriptions of key allies and secondary characters.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/characters/relationships.md",
    "content": "# Character Relationships\n\n[Mapping the connections between all major characters.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/continuity/glossary.md",
    "content": "# Glossary\n\n- Aether: The essence of magic.\n- Zenith: The peak of a celestial cycle."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/continuity/rules.md",
    "content": "# Rules\n\n- Magic requires celestial alignment.\n- Power scales with the proximity of the moons."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/continuity/open-questions.md",
    "content": "# Open Questions\n\n- What happens during a total eclipse?\n- Who discovered the first magic source?"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/manuscript/draft-boundary.md",
    "content": "# Draft Boundary\n\n[Defining the scope of the current writing phase.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/manuscript/scene-seeds.md",
    "content": "# Scene Seeds\n\n- A sudden starfall in the capital city.\n- A secret meeting under the crescent moon."
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/checks/structure-audit.md",
    "content": "# Structure Audit\n\n[Verification of the document hierarchy and links.]"
  },
  {
    "path": "stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/checks/readiness-audit.md",
    "content": "# Readiness Audit\n\n[Verification of content completeness and consistency.]"
  }
]
